title: Foreign Influence Registration Scheme: administration
body: "The Foreign Influence Registration Scheme (FIRS) protects the safety and interests of the UK by improving the understanding of activity taking place in the UK at the instruction of a foreign state or certain foreign state‑controlled organisations. It is contained within part 4 of the National Security Act 2023.  The Foreign Influence Registration Scheme is managed by a case management team based in the Home Office.  This guidance outlines the team’s remit.   Give feedback on the FIRS guidance.   "
